title: National Water Supply Contamination
description: A chemical spill contaminates a major water source serving millions.

A.title: Shut down the water system and truck in clean water

C.title: Downplay the contamination to avoid panic

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: Contaminated water is a direct threat to national health. Shut it down immediately.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Shutting it down restricts freedom and creates chaos. People can boil water themselves.

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: Boil-water advisories protect health without destroying the economy.

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: Advisories aren’t enough if contamination levels are severe.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Downplaying avoids panic, but transparency is essential.

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: Transparency keeps trust intact. Panic is manageable — poisoning isn’t.
